required_gates.assertion: runtime-profile.json exists and records active runtime or explicit ambiguity.
Birth sequence completes or defers environment adaptation before project context intake.
Cleanup rules protect router, contract, skills, tools, references, templates, schemas, state, memory, license, and package code.
Adapters point to the canonical router and semantic contract instead of copying full workflows.
project-context.json records user inputs, sources, assumptions, missing evidence, and next valid actions.
The first post-birth action belongs to the installed agent's mission, not package maintenance.
Runtime contains no devkit, validation junk, local absolute paths, secrets, or inactive-adapter confusion.
